channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Roughriders Defense Ends Turnover Drought with Victory Over Ti-Cats
item.description: The Regina Roughriders made history in their matchup against the Ti-Cats by finally ending a long-standing turnover drought. This victory marked a pivotal moment for the team, which had struggled with...

item.title: Monica Mkandla eyes world title after decisive victory
item.description: Monica Mkandla, the 26-year-old Zimbabwean boxer trained in Edenvale by Vusi Mtolo, has secured a sixth-round stoppage win against Simamkele Tutsheni, boosting her prospects for a world title. Her man...

item.title: Sam Neill: A Legacy of Subtle Excellence in Film
item.description: Sam Neill, the acclaimed Australian actor who passed away at 78, left an indelible mark on cinema through his nuanced performances. Born Nigel John Dermot Neill in Northern Ireland, he moved to New Ze...

item.title: Evidence from Nine African Countries Shows Youth Employment Programmes Need Better Funding, Stronger Institutions and Closer Links to Employers
item.description: Africa has one of the youngest populations in the world, creating both a major opportunity and a serious challenge for governments. The article argues that youth employment programmes across nine Afri...

item.title: USWNT to Face Spain, 2023 World Cup Champions, in October Friendlies
item.description: The U.S. women’s national team (USWNT) has announced plans to host Spain, the reigning Women's World Cup champions and currently top-ranked team globally, in a pair of friendly matches this October. T...

item.title: Health experts warn of rising anaplasmosis cases and urge early treatment
item.description: A new study published in the Canadian Medical Association Journal highlights the growing threat of anaplasmosis, a tick-borne illness often mistaken for Lyme disease. Dr. Michael Quon, an internal med...

item.title: US National Arrested at Nepal Border for Entering India Without Documents
item.description: An American national, Jordan Brown, was detained by the Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) near the India-Nepal border in Uttar Pradesh's Mainihwa area. According to police, Brown entered India via a sea route...

item.title: Field Marshal Asim Munir's Two-Day Official Visit to Turkiye Focuses on Defense Cooperation
item.description: Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir, Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of Army Staff (COAS), has arrived in Turkiye for a two-day official visit, according to state media. During his visit, he is set ...

item.title: Trinity Tatum and Bryce Dettloff Win Love Island USA Season 8 with $100,000 Prize
item.description: Trinity Tatum and Bryce Dettloff have emerged as the winners of Love Island USA Season 8, beating three other couples in a dramatic finale. The couple, who were fan favorites throughout the competitio...

item.title: Melvin Matibag to Appear Before Impeachment Court on July 20
item.description: The impeachment court has scheduled Melvin Matibag's testimony for July 20, following the prosecution's request for him to appear. This development comes as part of ongoing proceedings against Matibag...

item.title: Supreme Court Launches Initiative to Address Backlog of Oldest Cases
item.description: Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant has introduced a structured docket-management initiative to expedite the resolution of the Supreme Court's oldest civil and criminal cases. The move, implemente...

item.title: Urban Development in Dar es Salaam: Balancing Growth and Public Spaces
item.description: The article explores the transformation of Dar es Salaam's public spaces into private developments, highlighting the loss of communal areas that once fostered community life. It contrasts the past, wh...

item.title: Jay-Z closes three-night Yankee Stadium celebration with guest appearances from Eminem, Rihanna, Pharrell and other music stars
item.description: Jay-Z completed his three-night run of anniversary concerts at New York's Yankee Stadium by welcoming an impressive line-up of special guests, including Eminem, Rihanna, Pharrell Williams, Beyoncé, Us...

item.title: Defense challenges NBI affidavit timeline in Sara Duterte impeachment case
item.description: The defense team in Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial has raised concerns about the timeline of affidavits submitted by the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) to the Department of Ju...

item.title: Supreme Court's mediation proposal rejected in Gyanvapi, Mathura and Sambhal mosque disputes
item.description: The Hindu and Muslim parties involved in the Gyanvapi mosque dispute in Varanasi, Shahi Idgah mosque in Mathura, and Shahi Jama Masjid in Sambhal have declined the Supreme Court's proposal for mediati...

item.title: Linda Mtoba Reflects on Her Masked Singer SA Journey and Motherhood
item.description: Linda Mtoba, a South African actress known for her roles in 'Isibaya', 'The River', and 'Queendom', revealed that her six-year-old daughter was the driving force behind her participation in season thr...

item.title: ICE agents shoot and kill driver in Maine after vehicle attempt to strike officer
item.description: Federal immigration agents shot and killed a driver in Biddeford, Maine, according to a state official and a witness. The incident, which occurred on a street intersection, involved ICE agents in gree...

item.title: Family Reflects on Positive Changes After Returning to Kenya
item.description: A family that relocated from the US to Kenya 14 months ago is sharing how their lives have transformed. They left behind the comforts of American life to provide their children with a richer upbringin...

item.title: Doctor Killed in Robbery Incident Near Teen Talwar in Karachi
item.description: A 28-year-old doctor, Akash, was killed during a robbery incident near Teen Talwar in Karachi. The incident involved suspected robbers and a bank security guard. Akash was withdrawing cash from a bank...

item.title: PDP urges Bayelsa Gov to tackle hunger, unemployment over stadium project
item.description: The People's Democratic Party (PDP) has strongly criticized Bayelsa State Governor, Douye Diri, for prioritizing a N100 billion stadium project over addressing critical social issues like hunger, unem...
